## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are DCO signed-off (`git commit -s`) and follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Public API changes update `PublicAPI.Unshipped.txt` (if packages are affected)
- [ ] New dependencies are permissive OSS only (MIT/Apache-2.0/BSD-class)
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
